title: A casino heiress proposed to a stranger—never knowing he was a mob boss who loved her for 15 years.
He risked their daughter to save his first love's child—she divorced him, and he broke down in tears
A runaway bride entered a mob boss’s car by mistake—one night led to a genius baby he adored.
To escape her twisted brother, she turned to a ruthless mob boss—who loved her gently.
Three years after breakup, he was engaged—she a waitress, yet he loved her deeply and chased her.
He jailed me for his first love—I rose as a CEO’s favorite, and only then did he regret.
Drugged, she entered the CEO’s room by mistake—one night later she was pregnant, he spoiled her.
No one could control the mad CEO—one soft kiss from a country girl tamed him, and he fell.
She sold her first night by mistake—CEO forced her as his secret lover, then regretted when she left
After 3 years of loving him, he saved his first love—I married another, he begged with red eyes.
She endured 100 IVF attempts for him—he cheated with an 18-year-old, she chose divorcehe regretted.
Her stepsister married her husband’s son to steal her status—until the tycoon shielded his wife.
Her stepsister stolewedding to change fate—she walked away and married a instructor who spoiled her.
Her ex of 4 years became her boss—spoiling her publicly, raising her child, chasing her relentlessly
Seven years in love, she was only a stand-in—she walked away and married a CEO who adored her.
To save her life, she hid in a comatose CEO’s arms—accidentally hearing his heart and awakening him.
For $3M she became mafia boss’s contract lover—pregnant the day，he was engaged, She quit，he red-eyed
The despised “fool” was the King of Hell reborn—one word revived the tycoon, making her adored.
After a drunken night with an infertile CEO, she got pregnant—and was carried home to be spoiled.
To cure herself, she replaced sister to marry celibate autistic CEO—only to be loved beyond control
Drained by Family Once, Reborn She Clings to a Tycoon Heiress, Kicks Cheaters, Slaps Mistresses
He faked his death for his first love and posed as his twin—she married his boss, he cried.
A disabled CEO fired 99 elite nannies—only this rookie girl stayed and softened his frozen heart.
A country girl married a disabled CEO? Wrong—she was a hidden mafia queen, cherished as a treasure.
A baby fell onto a CEO’s car—turns out she was his real daughter, spoiled from that day on.
5-year-old turns out to be a stock prodigy—whatever he points at soars, CEO takes him home to spoil
A rebel class drove out 33 teachers—until their new female teacher ruled them like a mafia queen
He treated her like a toy. She sent him a sterilization plan and slept with his CEO uncle.He cried
She learned from TV he slept with his secretary. 1,000 nights meant a cold deal—she left, he cried.
A 5-year-old ginseng fairy came down to repay a debt—saved marshal and became the family favorite
Killed while pregnant by those she trusted, she woke up at her funeral—and vowed to make them pay.
He approached her for an inheritance, thinking he controlled the game—until he lost his heart to her
She stole my engagement. I married a poor guard—unaware he’d loved me for years as mafia lord.
A spoiled heiress met a stoic bodyguard—one accidental handhold unleashed his hidden desire.
10 years of love ended in betrayal and humiliation. After divorce, she fell into first love’s arms
She was auctioned as a prize, mocked by all—until a mafia boss fell for her and claimed her as his
He swore to love only her, then ran back to his first love. She married his CEO brother—and he broke
To escape family’s control, she played dumb to get close to a cold mafia boss—became his obsession.
An 18-year-old student is proposed to by a school bully—unaware she’s true leader of a mafia family.
Forced to marry a CEO nine years older, one wedding-night kiss shattered his restraint—he fell hard.
After drowning, she was saved by her ex’s pilot father—married him on spot, becoming his stepmother
He promised to marry her—but she got his engagement news. She left and was spoiled by 3 CEO brothers
Village girl saved an injured CEO by chance—he fell for her at first sight, determined to marry her
Fleeing an arranged marriage, she crossed paths with a ruthless mafia boss—was spoiled every night.
He said she bored him. She canceled engagement, married his brother—became treasured sister-in-law.
CEO sent his brother to consummate the marriage. She divorced him and married the brother instead.
She got drunk and spent night with her friend’s CEO bro—everyone expected ruin, but he spoiled her
Forced into marriage after bankruptcy, she never expected disabled CEO to fall desperately in love
Before giving birth, she exposed her husband’s plot, walked away, returned as an heiress.He cried
CEO married a pregnant cleaner on impulse, to find the baby was his—fall into wife-spoiling madness.
